page: Amazon Web Services r7gd.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by an 8-core AWS Graviton Neoverse-V1 ARMv8 processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, backed by 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 474 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong memory subsystem performance, with the Passmark memory score reaching the top-tier category and large-block read-only memory bandwidth registering a strong 181.03 GB/sec. CPU performance is moderate, with stress-ng single-core and multi-core metrics falling in the average range, though Passmark CPU and encryption scores are relatively weak. Redis SET operations perform at an average rate of 12.13 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput reaches 15.79 GB/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the r7gd.2xlarge offers high memory density and integrated high-speed local NVMe storage, reducing the need for external block storage for temporary data. This makes the instance well-suited for memory-intensive workloads that require fast local scratch space, such as caching layers, relational databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, and medium-scale data processing pipelines.
description: Amazon Web Services r7gd.2xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized server powered by an 8-core AWS Graviton Neoverse-V1 processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio, and includes 474 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network speed of 4 Gbps. Benchmark results highlight top-tier memory performance, with strong large-block read bandwidth of 181.03 GB/sec, while CPU compute and encryption tests show average to weak performance. The inclusion of high-speed local storage alongside dense memory makes this instance highly efficient for memory-bound applications requiring fast local scratch space. It is suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and data processing workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r7gd.2xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized server featuring 8 Graviton cores, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 474 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier memory performance for database workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r7gd.2xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized server with 8 Graviton cores, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 474 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: An ARM-based, memory-optimized instance featuring high-speed local NVMe storage and top-tier memory bandwidth for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated ARM64 AWS Graviton Neoverse-V1 cores at 2.6 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory with top-tier memory bandwidth performance
474 GB of integrated local NVMe SSD instance storage
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the AWS Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and data processing
